fixture: fixtures/state: a pasted Figma export (degraded mode) with 2 Variables (a color + a spacing), 1 component set (Button, 2 variants), and 1 frame using Auto Layout

must_create: an IR object before any Penpot write
2 Penpot tokens migrated from the Variables (real token types)
a Button component with its 2 variants
a screen Board whose Auto Layout became a flex layout

claiming a perfect 1:1 if any feature didn't map
